name: Radio Online
description: Automated online radio streaming plugin. Stream audio to Icecast servers with weekly playlist scheduling, supporting OGG and M4A formats with smart time-slot management.
overview: Automated online radio streaming to Icecast servers with weekly playlist scheduling. Assign Jellyfin playlists to specific day/time slots, with automatic random music fill for unscheduled hours.

versions.changelog:
- Alpha release
- Icecast server streaming support (OGG Vorbis / M4A AAC)
- Weekly schedule programming (Monday-Friday)
- Jellyfin playlist integration for scheduled slots
- Smart time-slot management: playlists are trimmed if they exceed the assigned time
- Random music fill when playlists end before the time slot
- Unscheduled hours and weekends filled with random music from Jellyfin library
- All schedules repeat weekly automatically
- Web-based configuration dashboard integrated in Jellyfin
- Streaming status monitoring via REST API
- Audio bitrate configuration (32-320 kbps)
- Stream metadata (name, description, genre) for Icecast listeners
